ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "first_traded" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was first traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the last update was made to the cryptocurrency's data */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close_price_usd" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "volume_usd" TEXT /* Volume of trades for the day in USD */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap_usd" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score of the exchange */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the exchange is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being traded */,
  "base_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base cryptocurrency (e.g., USDT, USD) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trading pair is available */,
  "min_order_size" REAL /* Minimum order size for the trading pair */,
  "max_order_size" REAL /* Maximum order size for the trading pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (buy or sell) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee is paid */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (market order or limit order) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, market cap) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Preferred notification method (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" TEXT /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table, summary) */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the widget */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the widget is active */,
  "widget_size" TEXT /* Size of the widget (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "widget_color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme of the widget (e.g., light, dark) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme preference (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone preference */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user receives email notifications */,
  "sms_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user receives SMS notifications */,
  "default_currency" TEXT /* Default currency of the user */,
  "default_exchange" INTEGER /* Default exchange of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "action_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
